theme.style: Clubhouse-at-dusk luxury: deep forest green felt textures paired with warm ivory and brass light, evoking leather scorecards, polished trophies, and old-money fairways. Lighting is soft and directional like late afternoon sun through clubhouse windows, with fine grain and velvet-smooth gradients. Mood is quietly confident and traditional, never flashy or arcade-like.
